relations.note: Adds a co-occurrence exclusivity constraint on top of the base three-style definitions.
Specifies responsive behavior for the text-heavy callout defined in the base binding rule.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
**Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text
**Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**
Main callout (key point): Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below.
Secondary/data callout: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text; may include one line icon
Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text

rules.intent: Standardize the three approved callout treatments so color, weight, and spacing stay consistent across materials.
rules.rule_text: Three callout formats are approved, each with its own locked color/spacing treatment: (1) Main callout — bold Brand Blue (#00529b) centered text bounded by 2px Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules, 16px padding between rule and text; (2) Secondary/data callout — a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with bold Brand Blue text, 20px internal padding, corner radius per the accent-shape callout spec (42px & 6px email), and an optional single line icon; (3) Text-heavy callout — a Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint with bold Brand Blue headline, bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, regular Graphite (#212121) body text, line icons, and 24px internal padding.

effect.reserved_for: at most one instance of a given callout style per screen/section
effect.subject: callout style (main / secondary-data / text-heavy)

quotes: never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visual redundancy and competing focal points within one screen/section.
rules.rule_text: Use the three approved callout styles judiciously: never place two callouts of the same style competing against each other within a single screen or section.

quotes: two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

rules.intent: Preserve legibility of the text-heavy callout on narrow mobile viewports.
rules.rule_text: The text-heavy callout's two-column icon+text layout collapses to a single column at the mobile breakpoint (≤480px).
